summary: Backend refactor regression validation. server.py modularized into /app/backend/routers/* + shared.py + models.py + deps.py. ALL three pytest regression suites pass clean: Phase C tasks 19/19, Phase D 19/19, Phase E 29/29 — total 67/67 PASS in 11.77s. New refactor smoke suite added (test_refactor_smoke.py, 21 tests) covering every relocated router (dashboard/construction/finance/notifications/whatsapp/dev_report/siteplan/customers/commissions) + auth/leads/deals still in server.py — 21/21 PASS. Cross-router helper imports verified (shared.py _normalize_phone / _apply_*_scope / _auto_create_task / _auto_create_commission / _find_or_create_customer_from_deal all wired). Atomic booking, RBAC scoping, auto-commission on booking, customer auto-link, idempotency — all intact. Frontend smoke: admin login OK; /tasks /customers /commissions /construction /finance all render full UI without 5xx, no console errors. NOTE: review_request listed several wrong path names — actual mounted paths verified: finance is /api/finance/billing + /api/finance/payments (not /api/billing-schedules), notifications rules at /api/notifications/auto-rules (not /api/auto-followup-rules), commission rules at /api/commissions/rules (not /api/commission-rules), siteplan at /api/siteplan/{project_id} (not /api/siteplan/nodes). All these endpoints work — paths just differ from the request brief.

ui_bugs.issue: Main content area renders empty for admin — sidebar OK, GET /api/dashboard returns 200 with valid {data:{projects,units,leads,deals,revenue,finance,construction,notifications,...}}, but UI shows no cards/widgets. Pre-existing frontend rendering issue (NOT a refactor regression — backend response shape unchanged, no console errors, no JS exceptions).
ui_bugs.selector: main content pane next to sidebar on /dashboard

action_items: [Not a refactor blocker] Investigate /dashboard and /overview empty content pane on the frontend — likely a component is reading dashboard payload from the wrong key (response is {data: {...}}, component may expect flat). Backend returns 200 + valid data. Other pages render fine, so this is isolated to the dashboard/overview view components.

[Doc] Update internal docs / handoff notes: the relocated endpoint paths are /api/finance/billing, /api/finance/payments, /api/finance/summary, /api/notifications/auto-rules, /api/commissions/rules, /api/siteplan/{project_id} — the review_request had outdated path names but actual routes are working.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py at 91KB / ~1950 lines is still large after the refactor. Recommend further extraction of leads_router.py and deals_router.py (the two heaviest remaining groups) before the next feature phase.

routers all use `from models import *` — wildcard import works but masks dependencies. Convert to explicit imports `from models import LeadCreate, DealCreate, ...` for IDE/linter friendliness and to catch unused model removals.

Helpers in shared.py are currently sync where they could be async (e.g., _auto_create_task does db writes via fastapi await). Verify there's no blocking-call regression after the move — current tests pass so no functional issue, but flagging for review.

routers/__init__.py is empty — fine, but consider exposing a single `register_routers(api_router)` helper so server.py becomes one import + one call instead of N include_router lines. Easier to add the next router.

success_rate.backend: 100% (88/88: 19 Phase C + 19 Phase D + 29 Phase E regression + 21 new refactor smoke)
success_rate.frontend: 83% (5/6 routes render fully — /tasks /customers /commissions /construction /finance OK; /dashboard and /overview render sidebar only, pre-existing UI bug unrelated to refactor)

test_credentials: admin@sipro.com/admin123, sales1@sipro.com/sipro123, marketing_admin@sipro.com/sipro123, finance@sipro.com/sipro123 — all confirmed working
seed_data_creation: Phase E/D/C tests create their own TEST_-prefixed seed data and clean up. No leftover state created in this iteration beyond what the regression suites manage themselves.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor is verified clean — 88/88 backend tests pass. New smoke suite at /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_smoke.py provides a fast (1.4s) cross-router health check for future refactors. Actual mounted paths (not the ones in the prior brief): /api/finance/billing|payments|summary, /api/notifications/auto-rules, /api/commissions/rules, /api/siteplan/{project_id}. Frontend /dashboard + /overview UI rendering is broken but the backend dashboard endpoint is healthy and returns the same {data:{...}} shape as before — investigation should focus on frontend OverviewPage/DashboardPage component data binding, not on the backend refactor.
rca of the issue: No backend bugs introduced by the refactor — all helper cross-imports (shared.py + models.py + deps.py) resolved correctly, atomic booking (motor session transaction in shared/server.py) intact, _auto_create_commission still fires from POST /api/deals/{id}/booking in server.py, _auto_create_task still fires from lead transition routes in server.py. Only finding: pre-existing /dashboard frontend blank pane (backend returns valid data, no JS errors) — not caused by this refactor since backend response is unchanged.
